virtualTools.name: update_task_state
virtualTools.description: Update the persistent task execution state. Call this after completing a significant step, before ending a session, or when you identify next actions / blockers / framework choices. The state survives across sessions and powers the 'continue' contract — when the user types 'continue', the framework resumes from next_actions[0] without rediscovering context.

completed_step.description: Natural-language description of the step just completed (e.g. 'Created root package.json and tsconfig.base.json').

next_actions.description: Ordered list of remaining actions. Replaces the current list. Put the very next thing to do at index 0.

blockers.description: Unresolved blockers or errors (replaces existing blockers list). Pass [] to clear.

tech_stack.description: Framework choices to lock for this task (e.g. {"backend": "express", "orm": "prisma", "frontend": "react-vite"}). Merged with existing entries — cannot be unset once written.

virtualTools.name: get_diagnostics
virtualTools.description: Read VS Code diagnostics (Problems panel) for a file or the entire workspace.

path.description: Optional relative file path to filter diagnostics.

virtualTools.name: create_document
virtualTools.description: Create a Word document (.docx) from Markdown content and save it to the workspace.

content_markdown.description: Full document body in Markdown. Use # h1, ## h2, ### h3, - bullets.

virtualTools.name: create_presentation
virtualTools.description: Create a PowerPoint presentation (.pptx). Use ## for each slide title, then - bullets for content.

slides_markdown.description: Slides in Markdown: ## Slide Title\n- bullet 1\n- bullet 2
